title: First Day at Work
prompt: Introduce yourself as a new employee and greet your manager politely.
hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning, my name is...' and 'Nice to meet you.'
sample: Good morning, my name is Tom. I am the new employee. Nice to meet you, Mr. Davis.

ja.prompt: 新しい従業員として自己紹介し、マネージャーに丁寧に挨拶してください。
ja.hint: 'Good morning, my name is...'や'Nice to meet you.'のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning, my name is Tom. I am the new employee. Nice to meet you, Mr. Davis.

zh.prompt: 作為新員工自我介紹並禮貌地向經理問好。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning, my name is...' 和 'Nice to meet you.' 的句子。
zh.sample: Good morning, my name is Tom. I am the new employee. Nice to meet you, Mr. Davis.

title: Taking a Customer's Order
prompt: Practice taking a customer's order at a cafe, asking about their preferences politely.
hint: Use polite questions like 'Can I take your order, please?' and offer options for food and drinks.
sample: Good morning. Can I take your order, please? I would like a cup of coffee and a chicken sandwich, please.

ja.prompt: カフェでお客様の注文を受ける練習をし、丁寧に好みを尋ねてください。
ja.hint: 'Can I take your order, please?'のような丁寧な質問を使い、食べ物や飲み物の選択肢を提供しましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning. Can I take your order, please? I would like a cup of coffee and a chicken sandwich, please.

zh.prompt: 練習在咖啡廳接客，禮貌地詢問顧客的點餐偏好。
zh.hint: 使用像 'Can I take your order, please?' 的禮貌用語，並提供食物和飲料的選擇。
zh.sample: Good morning. Can I take your order, please? I would like a cup of coffee and a chicken sandwich, please.

title: Handling a Mistake with an Order
prompt: Apologize to a customer for giving the wrong order and explain how you will fix it.
hint: Use polite apology phrases like 'I am very sorry' and offer to correct the mistake quickly.
sample: Excuse me. I ordered a chicken sandwich, but this is tuna. I am very sorry. Please wait one moment. I will bring the correct sandwich right away.

ja.prompt: 間違った注文を渡してしまったお客様に謝罪し、どのように対応するか説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I am very sorry'のような丁寧な謝罪表現を使い、すぐに間違いを直すことを伝えましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me. I ordered a chicken sandwich, but this is tuna. I am very sorry. Please wait one moment. I will bring the correct sandwich right away.

zh.prompt: 向顧客道歉因為給錯餐點，並說明你將如何解決問題。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I am very sorry' 的禮貌道歉語句，並承諾快速更正錯誤。
zh.sample: Excuse me. I ordered a chicken sandwich, but this is tuna. I am very sorry. Please wait one moment. I will bring the correct sandwich right away.

title: Reflecting on a First Day Mistake
prompt: Describe a mistake you made on your first day at work and how you handled it.
hint: Explain the situation, your feelings, and the actions you took to fix the mistake.
sample: I gave a customer a tuna sandwich, but she ordered chicken. I was embarrassed, but I apologized and brought the correct sandwich.

ja.prompt: 初出勤の日にしたミスと、それにどう対処したかを説明してください。
ja.hint: 状況、気持ち、そしてミスを直すために取った行動を説明しましょう。
ja.sample: I gave a customer a tuna sandwich, but she ordered chicken. I was embarrassed, but I apologized and brought the correct sandwich.

zh.prompt: 描述你第一天工作時犯的錯誤以及你如何處理它。
zh.hint: 說明情況、你的感受以及你採取的補救措施。
zh.sample: I gave a customer a tuna sandwich, but she ordered chicken. I was embarrassed, but I apologized and brought the correct sandwich.

title: Polite Phrases for Customer Service
prompt: Practice using polite phrases when serving customers, such as ordering and apologizing.
hint: Use phrases like 'I would like', 'Can I take your order, please?', and 'I am very sorry'.
sample: I would like a cup of coffee, please. Can I take your order, please? I am very sorry for the mistake.

ja.prompt: お客様に接客するときの丁寧なフレーズを練習してください。注文や謝罪の表現を含みます。
ja.hint: 'I would like', 'Can I take your order, please?', 'I am very sorry'のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: I would like a cup of coffee, please. Can I take your order, please? I am very sorry for the mistake.

zh.prompt: 練習在服務顧客時使用禮貌用語，如點餐和道歉。
zh.hint: 使用像 'I would like', 'Can I take your order, please?', 和 'I am very sorry' 的句子。
zh.sample: I would like a cup of coffee, please. Can I take your order, please? I am very sorry for the mistake.
